findings.title: Add missing `requests` dependency to requirements.txt
findings.what: Add `requests>=2.31.0` to requirements.txt — it's imported in youtube_service_rapidapi.py but not declared. Docker healthcheck also depends on it.
findings.why: YouTube transcript extraction and container healthchecks silently fail in fresh builds. Two unmerged branches (`heartbeat/2026-04-02-add-missing-requests-dependency`) suggest this was spotted but never landed.

findings.title: Fix bare `except:` in main.py startup
findings.what: Line 83: change `except:` to `except Exception:` in `check_admin_or_debug_access()`. An unmerged branch exists for this too (`heartbeat/2026-04-02-fix-bare-except-in-main-py-startup`).
findings.why: Bare except catches SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt, masking real errors during startup and making debugging impossible.

findings.title: Commit staged security headers in next.config.ts
findings.what: The staged changes add X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, and Referrer-Policy headers. Also add HSTS (`Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains`) while touching this file. Resolve the unstaged tsconfig.json formatting drift at the same time.
findings.why: Security headers are ready but sitting uncommitted. HSTS is already on nginx but not on Vercel-served pages.

findings.title: Pin wildcard dependencies in package.json
findings.what: Replace `"clsx": "*"` and `"tailwind-merge": "*"` with pinned versions (run `npm ls clsx tailwind-merge` to get current resolved versions).
findings.why: Wildcard versions can pull breaking changes on any install, causing non-reproducible builds.

findings.title: Strip or gate console.log statements in frontend
findings.what: 20+ console.log/error calls across frontend code, including auth token logging in apollo-client.ts. Wrap in `process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'` checks or remove entirely.
findings.why: Leaks sensitive data (JWT tokens, API responses) to browser console in production.

findings.title: Add React Error Boundary for critical routes
findings.what: Create an ErrorBoundary component and wrap ChatInterface, ProjectDetailPage, and PatternLibrary. These are the three highest-risk components (complex state, external API calls, image processing).
findings.why: Any uncaught render error crashes the entire app with a white screen. Error boundaries degrade gracefully and let users recover without a full reload.

findings.title: Split 870-line mutations.py into domain modules
findings.what: Extract into mutations_auth.py, mutations_projects.py, mutations_ai.py, mutations_patterns.py. Re-export from mutations/__init__.py to keep imports stable.
findings.why: Single 870-line file is hard to navigate and creates merge conflicts when multiple features touch mutations simultaneously.
